description: Captions enriched with thematic emojis and strategic line breaks to highlight product features, weekly specials, and limited-time offers in F&B content.
structural_recipe: Open with attention-grabbing emoji (e.g., 🌋 for dramatic products). Insert time-sensitive hook ("Esta semana", "Sep 29–Oct 4"). Use directional emoji (👇) to guide eye flow. List product variants with category-specific emoji (🫐 for berries). Capitalize product names. Include NEW/LIMITED callouts. Stack vertically with emoji prefix for each item. Close with descriptive modifiers ("fresh whipped").
why_it_works: Emojis reduce cognitive load in fast-scroll feeds while adding visual rhythm. Time-bound urgency (weekly rotation) triggers FOMO in Saudi consumers. Vertical formatting with emoji anchors creates scannable hierarchy. Product layering language ("double-stacked", "layered") appeals to premium positioning and indulgence values in Gulf F&B market.
transplantation_caveats: Emoji selection must respect cultural sensitivities (avoid religious or politically charged symbols)
Spanish/bilingual opening may require Arabic/English adaptation for broader Saudi reach
Time zones and local holiday calendars must align with stated promotion windows
cultural_constraints: Avoid emojis depicting alcohol, pork, or non-halal imagery
Ensure limited-time language respects Friday/weekend timing preferences in Saudi Arabia
